name: Spiced Whiskey Sauce for Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. Place pork in a shallow dish or container and pour the marinade over the meat, ensuring it is fully coated.
3. Refrigerate the marinated pork for at least 8 hours, preferably overnight.
4. Preheat grill or broiler.
5. When ready to cook, lightly oil the grill grates.
6. Place the pork on the hot grill and baste often with the marinade.
7. Grill or broil until the internal temperature of the pork reaches your desired level of doneness.
8. Remove from heat and serve. Makes 1-1/2 cups.
